quicksight.analysis.columnhierarchy.CfnA: The option that determines the hierarchy of the fields for a visual element.

quicksight.analysis.columnhierarchy.Date.Description: The option that determines the hierarchy of any `DateTime` fields.

quicksight.analysis.columnhierarchy.Expl.Description: The option that determines the hierarchy of the fields that are built within a visual's field wells. These fields can't be duplicated to other visuals.

quicksight.analysis.columnhierarchy.Pred.Description: The option that determines the hierarchy of the fields that are defined during data preparation. These fields are available to use in any analysis that uses the data source.
